intended_use: AI-Rad Companion (Cardiovascular) is image processing software that provides quantitative and qualitative analysis from previously acquired Computed Tomography DICOM images to support radiologists and
intended_use_full: AI-Rad Companion (Cardiovascular) is image processing software that provides quantitative and qualitative analysis from previously acquired Computed Tomography DICOM images to support radiologists and physicians from emergency medicine, specialty care, urgent care, and general practice in the evaluation and assessment of cardiovascular diseases.
target_condition: cardiovascular diseases, including coronary artery calcification and aortic disease
ground_truth: Not explicitly stated; implied to be manual expert annotations or gold-standard measurements from reference clinical data
other_metrics: Logarithmic correlation coefficient of total coronary calcium volume: 0.96 (N=381); Average absolute error in aorta diameters: 1.6 mm (95% confidence interval: [1.5 mm, 1.7 mm]) across nine measurement locations, range 0.9 mm to 2.4 mm per location (N=193)
